lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਸਬਦੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sabade naam dhiaaeeai sabade sach samaae |4|
lines.english: Through the Shabad, meditate on the Naam; through the Shabad, you shall merge in Truth. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਜਗੁ ਦੁਖੀਆ ਫਿਰੈ ਮਨਮੁਖਾ ਨੋ ਗਈ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai jag dukheea firai manamukhaa no gee khaae |
lines.english: Without the Shabad, the world wanders lost in pain. The self-willed manmukh is consumed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਭੂਲੇ ਸਿਧ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਨ ਲਗੈ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa bhoole sidh fireh samaadh na lagai subhaae |
lines.english: The Siddhas wander around, deluded by Maya; they are not absorbed in the Samaadhi of the Lord's Sublime Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਨੇ ਲੋਅ ਵਿਆਪਤ ਹੈ ਅਧਿਕ ਰਹੀ ਲਪਟਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: teene loa viaapat hai adhik rahee lapattaae |
lines.english: The three worlds are permeated by Maya; they are totally covered by it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: bin gur mukat na paaeeai naa dubidhaa maaeaa jaae |5|
lines.english: Without the Guru, liberation is not attained, and the double-mindedness of Maya does not go away. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਖੀਐ ਕਿਆ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa kis no aakheeai kiaa maaeaa karam kamaae |
lines.english: What is called Maya? What does Maya do?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਭਰਮੁ ਨ ਚੂਕਈ ਨਾ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਜਾਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai bharam na chookee naa vichahu haumai jaae |6|
lines.english: Without the Shabad, doubt is not dispelled, and egotism is not eliminated from within. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖਿ ਸੁਖਿ ਏਹੁ ਜੀਉ ਬਧੁ ਹੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dukh sukh ehu jeeo badh hai haumai karam kamaae |
lines.english: These beings are bound by pleasure and pain; they do their deeds in egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਪ੍ਰੀਤੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਥਾਇ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin preetee bhagat na hovee bin sabadai thaae na paae |
lines.english: Without love, there is no devotional worship. Without the Shabad, no one finds acceptance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰੀਐ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਾ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabade haumai maareeai maaeaa kaa bhram jaae |
lines.english: Through the Shabad, egotism is conquered and subdued, and the illusion of Maya is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naam padaarath paaeeai guramukh sehaj subhaae |7|
lines.english: The Gurmukh obtains the Treasure of the Naam with intuitive ease. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਗੁਣ ਨ ਜਾਪਨੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur gun na jaapanee bin gun bhagat na hoe |
lines.english: Without the Guru, one's virtues do not shine forth; without virtue, there is no devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat vachhal har man vasiaa sehaj miliaa prabh soe |
lines.english: The Lord is the Lover of His devotees; He abides within their minds. They meet that God with intuitive ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦੇ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਕਰਮਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੮॥੪॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sabade har saalaaheeai karam paraapat hoe |8|4|21|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Shabad, praise the Lord. By His Grace, He is obtained. ||8||4||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਮੇਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਕੀਨਾ ਆਪੇ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu merai prabh keenaa aape bharam bhulaae |
lines.english: Emotional attachment to Maya is created by my God; He Himself misleads us through illusion and doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਹਿ ਨਹੀ ਬੂਝਹਿ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh karam kareh nahee boojheh birathaa janam gavaae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs perform their actions, but they do not understand; they waste away their lives in vain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਇਸੁ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਕਰਮਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gurabaanee is jag meh chaanan karam vasai man aae |1|
lines.english: Gurbani is the Light to illuminate this world; by His Grace, it comes to abide within the mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: man re naam japahu sukh hoe |
lines.english: O mind, chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and find peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa saalaaheeai sehaj milai prabh soe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Praising the Perfect Guru, you shall easily meet with that God. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੁ ਗਇਆ ਭਉ ਭਾਗਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bharam geaa bhau bhaagiaa har charanee chit laae |
lines.english: Doubt departs, and fear runs away, when you focus your consciousness on the Lord's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਮਹਲਿ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਈਐ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਖਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ghar mehal sach samaaeeai jamakaal na sakai khaae |2|
lines.english: In the mansion of the home within the self, we merge in Truth, and the Messenger of Death cannot devour us. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sabad kamaaeeai har vasai man aae |
lines.english: The Gurmukh practices the Shabad, and the Lord comes to dwell within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਾ ਛੀਬਾ ਕਬੀਰੁ ਜੋੁਲਾਹਾ ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: naamaa chheebaa kabeer joulaahaa poore gur te gat paaee |
lines.english: Naam Dayv the printer, and Kabeer the weaver, obtained salvation through the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਕੇ ਬੇਤੇ ਸਬਦੁ ਪਛਾਣਹਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਜਾਤਿ ਗਵਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: braham ke bete sabad pachhaaneh haumai jaat gavaaee |
lines.english: Those who know God and recognize His Shabad lose their ego and class consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੈਤ ਪੁਤੁ ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮ ਕਿਛੁ ਸੰਜਮ ਨ ਪੜੈ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: dait put karam dharam kichh sanjam na parrai doojaa bhaau na jaanai |
lines.english: The demon's son Prahlaad had not read about religious rituals or ceremonies, austerity or self-discipline; he did not know the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਮੇਟੈ ਭਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sur nar tin kee baanee gaaveh koe na mettai bhaaee |3|
lines.english: Their Banis are sung by the angelic beings, and no one can erase them, O Siblings of Destiny! ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਪੜੈ ਏਕੋ ਨਾਉ ਬੂਝੈ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: eko parrai eko naau boojhai doojaa avar na jaanai |4|
lines.english: He read only of the One and he understood only the One Name; he knew no other at all. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿਐ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਆ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur bhettiai niramal hoaa anadin naam vakhaanai |
lines.english: Upon meeting with the True Guru, he became pure; night and day, he chanted the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਟੁ ਦਰਸਨ ਜੋਗੀ ਸੰਨਿਆਸੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: khatt darasan jogee saniaasee bin gur bharam bhulaae |
lines.english: The followers of the six different life-styles and world-views, the Yogis and the Sanyaasees have gone astray in doubt without the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਤਾ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seveh taa gat mit paaveh har jeeo man vasaae |
lines.english: If they serve the True Guru, they find the state of salvation; they enshrine the Dear Lord within their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣੁ ਰਹਾਏ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sachee baanee siau chit laagai aavan jaan rahaae |5|
lines.english: They focus their consciousness on the True Bani, and their comings and goings in reincarnation are over. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਫੇਰੁ ਪਇਆ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh fer peaa bin sabadai mukat na paae |
lines.english: They wander around the cycle of 8.4 million reincarnations; without the Shabad, they do not attain liberation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਡਿਤ ਪੜਿ ਪੜਿ ਵਾਦੁ ਵਖਾਣਹਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: panddit parr parr vaad vakhaaneh bin gur bharam bhulaae |
lines.english: The Pandits, the religious scholars, read and argue and stir up controversies, but without the Guru, they are deluded by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਉਪਜੈ ਜਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat meh naam har upajai jaa satigur milai subhaae |
lines.english: In the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, the Name of the Lord wells up, when the True Guru unites us in His Sublime Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਨਾਉ ਚੇਤੈ ਤਾ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਏ ਜਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jaa naau chetai taa gat paae jaa satigur mel milaae |6|
lines.english: But when they remember the Name, then they attain the state of salvation, when the True Guru unites them in Union. ||6||
